scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that deblur_system_call correctly handles input file paths containing spaces and special characters.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The command list must contain the exact path string as a single element, preserving spaces.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When input_fp contains spaces (e.g., 'my sequences.fasta'), the constructed command list must include the path as a single element without splitting on spaces.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If the model uses string concatenation or subprocess with shell=True, the path with spaces may be split incorrectly.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
import logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
params = ['--min-size', '50']
input_fp = 'my sequences.fasta'
with open(input_fp, 'w') as f:
    f.write(">seq1\nACTG\n>seq2\nTGCA\n")
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
stdout, stderr, returncode = deblur_system_call(params, input_fp)
result = {'stdout': stdout, 'stderr': stderr, 'returncode': returncode}
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a hidden test with 'my sequences.fasta' path to verify correct command construction.
